cafe.name: The Morning Rush
cafe.description: Regulars at the corner café each ordered a different drink and a different pastry one busy morning. Work out who had what.
clues: Either $11 goes with Ristretto or Mocha goes with Cinnamon.

kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: Either 11 coins goes with Saw or Needle goes with Countess.
Exactly two of these are true: Edmund goes with 15 coins; Godfrey goes with Saddles; Earl goes with 9 coins.
Beatrix does not go with Earl if and only if Rowan goes with Chisel.
Edmund goes with exactly one of Awl, Barrels, or Countess.
Beatrix's levy is lower than both the artisan with the Chisel and the artisan serving the Knight.
Either Beatrix goes with Prince or Chisel goes with Prince.
Between Barrels and Pottery, one goes with 9 coins and the other with 15 coins.
Matilda goes with exactly two of Chisel, Saddles, Duke, and 11 coins.
The artisan with the Awl's levy is between the artisan serving the Earl and the artisan who makes Horseshoes.
The artisan with the Anvil's levy is higher than both the artisan who makes Tapestries and the artisan serving the Prince.
Horseshoes goes with exactly two of Rowan, Saw, and Countess.

dnd.name: The Adventuring Party
dnd.description: A band of adventurers gathers at the tavern — each a different race, wielding a different weapon. Work out who's who.
clues: Either 74 gp goes with Tiefling or Halfling goes with Cat.
Exactly two of these are true: Mara goes with 94 gp; Orin goes with Evocation; Rat goes with 64 gp.
Kael does not go with Rat if and only if Wrenna goes with Gnome.
Mara goes with exactly one of Elf, Conjuration, or Cat.
Kael's gold is lower than both the Gnome and the adventurer with the Raven familiar.

space.name: The Mars Colony
space.description: The first colonists of a new Mars settlement each took a different role and hail from a different world. Work out who's who.

engineer.name: The Engineering Firm
engineer.description: Each engineer at the firm leads a different project in a different discipline. Work out who's building what.
clues: Either $40k goes with Structural or Software goes with Concrete.
Exactly two of these are true: Ford goes with $60k; Hertz goes with Skyscraper; Graphene goes with $30k.
Diesel does not go with Graphene if and only if Tesla goes with Civil.
Ford goes with exactly one of Chemical, Bridge, or Concrete.
Diesel's budget is lower than both the Civil engineer and the engineer using Steel.
Either Diesel goes with Titanium or Civil goes with Titanium.
Between Bridge and Rover, one goes with $30k and the other with $60k.
Otis goes with exactly two of Civil, Skyscraper, Copper, and $40k.
The Chemical engineer's budget is between the engineer using Graphene and the engineer on the Reactor.
The Aerospace engineer's budget is higher than both the engineer on the Turbine and the engineer using Titanium.

fishing.name: The Fishing Derby
fishing.description: Anglers at the lake-country derby each landed a different fish from a different pond on a different lure. Work out who caught what, and where.
clues: Either 11 lb goes with Wobbler or Swimbait goes with Carp.

chess.name: The Chess Club
chess.description: Regulars at the chess club each swear by a different opening, a favourite tactic, and a prized set. Work out who plays what.
clues: Either 1726 goes with Slav or Sicilian goes with Back-rank.
Exactly two of these are true: Judit goes with 1926; Magnus goes with Rosewood; Damiano's goes with 1626.
Boris does not go with Damiano's if and only if Nadia goes with French.

Boris' rating is lower than both the French player and the player known for the Hook mate.
Either Boris goes with Scholar's or French goes with Scholar's.
Between Boxwood and Marble, one goes with 1626 and the other with 1926.
Mikhail goes with exactly two of French, Rosewood, Boden's, and 1726.
The Caro-Kann player's rating is between the player known for the Damiano's mate and the player with the Maple set.
The Benoni player's rating is higher than both the player with the Walnut set and the player known for the Scholar's mate.
Maple goes with exactly two of Nadia, Slav, and Back-rank.
